I've located the URLs for the Virtue restaurant & bar's dinner menu page on the Wayback Machine for the required dates. I will now retrieve the content of these menus and compare them.

Let's proceed step-by-step.

### Step 1: Retrieve the dinner menu for March 22, 2021
URL: https://web.archive.org/web/20210322000000*/https://www.virtuerestaurant.com/menu

### Step 2: Retrieve the dinner menu for April 21, 2021
URL: https://web.archive.org/web/20210421000000*/https://www.virtuerestaurant.com/menu

Now, I'll extract the content of the dinner menus from these URLs.

I need to analyze the HTML content from these snapshots and identify the main courses listed on each menu. Let's extract the data from these pages.

#### Retrieve and Parse HTML:
We will use Python with requests and BeautifulSoup libraries to scrape and parse the menu contents.

### Retrieving Menu for March 22, 2021:
```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# URL for March 22, 2021
url_march = "https://web.archive.org/web/20210322000000*/https://www.virtuerestaurant.com/menu"

response = requests.get(url_march)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html.parser')

# Extract menu items
menu_items_march = soup.find_all(class_='menu-item')  # Assuming 'menu-item' is the class for menu items
menu_march = [item.get_text().strip() for item in menu_items_march]

print("Menu on March 22, 2021:", menu_march)
```

### Retrieving Menu for April 21, 2021:
```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# URL for April 21, 2021
url_april = "https://web.archive.org/web/20210421000000*/https://www.virtuerestaurant.com/menu"

response = requests.get(url_april)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html.parser')

# Extract menu items
menu_items_april = soup.find_all(class_='menu-item')  # Assuming 'menu-item' is the class for menu items
menu_april = [item.get_text().strip() for item in menu_items_april]

print("Menu on April 21, 2021:", menu_april)
```

By running these scripts, we can extract the menu items for each date and compare them to identify the main course that was present on March 22, 2021 but not on April 21, 2021. I'll execute these scripts now.
